description_long: This object is a fire extinguisher housed inside a rectangular, metallic wall-mounted cabinet with a transparent glass front. The cabinet is weathered and covered in various stickers and graffiti, giving it an urban, well-used appearance. The fire extinguisher inside is red with a yellow and white instruction label, and it is clearly visible through the glass door. The cabinet features a lock at the top center of the glass door, and the sides and back are adorned with colorful stickers, tags, and spray-painted graffiti. The top of the cabinet also has a few stickers, and the overall surface is matte with visible wear and grime. The object is designed to be both protective and accessible in case of emergency, blending into a gritty city environment.
description: A red fire extinguisher encased in a weathered, glass-fronted metal cabinet covered in urban stickers and graffiti. The cabinet is lockable and designed for emergency use in public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fire extinguisher through a glass door, with a lock and visible instruction label.
description_view_1: Side view displaying multiple stickers and graffiti, with no visibility of the extinguisher inside.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a large area of pink spray-painted graffiti on a worn metal surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring more stickers, including a cartoon character and a butterfly, as well as additional graffiti.
attribute_label_or_signage: Instructional label on the fire extinguisher (yellow and white with text and icons), various stickers and graffiti on all exterior sides of the cabinet.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: The fire extinguisher is housed in a wall-mounted metal cabinet with a visible lock at the top center of the glass door.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose or nozzle is visible behind the fire extinguisher inside the cabinet, coiled and secured in place.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible on the fire extinguisher handle inside the cabinet.
